---
name: Privacy or security concern
about: Report a privacy-sensitive issue or suspected vulnerability
title: ""
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the concern.

## Impact

What data, permissions, credentials, or local files may be affected?

## Steps to reproduce

If safe to share publicly, provide steps. If the issue is sensitive, report it
privately as described in `SECURITY.md`.

## Affected area

- Activity capture
- Browser Companion / Native Messaging
- Local SQLite storage
- Portable export / restore
- Keychain
- AI provider calls
- Logo.dev calls
- Logs / diagnostics
- Packaging / signing

## Redaction

Do not post real activity logs, credentials, API keys, full browser URLs,
private local paths, or screenshots with private data unless they are redacted.
